consistency_overall.summary: The trajectory fits a socially attentive, accommodating communicator, but it under-expresses the core weakness of an extroverted social explorer and feels more conscientious than socially impulsive.

swap_detail.justification: Trajectory shows low-energy, sleep-deprived, academic-first behavior with avoidant async messaging, short-horizon prioritization of the hardest same-day deadline, and willingness to treat the meeting as a soft cost—matching Persona A’s values, decision tendencies, and communication style.
Trajectory matches Persona A’s low energy/sleep debt, academic-first prioritization, avoidant async messaging, and tendency to protect a hard deadline while treating the meeting as a soft cost.

Trajectory shows compromise-focused messaging, text-first communication, and repeated balancing of academics with relationships/health, matching Persona A’s medium-horizon, compromising style more than B’s face-to-face, accommodating, relationship-weighted profile.

Trajectory shows compromise-oriented text messaging, medium-horizon prioritization of academics with health protection, and repeated balancing of meeting/assignment demands, matching Persona A’s balanced priorities and compromising conflict style more than Persona B’s relationship-heavy, accommodating social-explorer pattern.

The trajectory shows compromise-oriented, moderately direct text-based coordination with a teammate plus balanced task/sleep decisions, matching Persona A’s compromising conflict style, text preference, and medium planning horizon more than Persona B’s avoidant async style and heavily academic, sleep-deprived profile.

Trajectory matches Persona A’s high academic priority, short-horizon deadline-chasing, procrastination/energy management, avoidant-but-brief async messaging, and willingness to treat the team meeting as a soft cost while pushing the near-deadline assignment first.

The trajectory is strongly achievement/deadline-focused, repeatedly prioritizing assignment and quiz prep over social opportunities, which matches Persona B’s high academic weighting, low relationship priority, and avoidant messaging style more than Persona A’s relationship-weighted, socially accommodating profile.

Trajectory matches Persona A’s academic-first priorities, avoidance-tilted async messaging, high procrastination/short-horizon crunch behavior, and tendency to treat the meeting as a soft cost while overcommitting to the near-deadline assignment.

Trajectory shows relationship-preserving, accommodating outreach to teammate_A plus repeated preference for joining/repairing social coordination while still underweighting plans under low energy, matching Persona A’s relationship-heavy, direct but accommodating style more than Persona B’s compromise-oriented baseline.

The trajectory shows compromise-oriented, text-based coordination with teammates and moderate academic/health balancing, matching Persona A’s compromising style and medium-horizon planning more than Persona B’s more social, accommodating, face-to-face profile.

Trajectory is achievement- and deadline-focused with avoidant, async-style teammate updates and low-energy sleep/recovery choices, matching Persona A’s academic priority, avoidant communication, and sleep deficit more than Persona B’s relationship-first extroversion.

The trajectory prioritizes academics under fatigue, uses avoidant async teammate messaging, and repeatedly chooses sleep/recovery and deadline-driven work—matching Persona A’s heavy academic weighting, low energy/sleep debt, and conflict-avoidant communication far more than Persona B’s relationship-first, social-extrovert profile.
